title: Nya fredssamtal i Mellanöstern – Ellos på väg till börsen
summary_md:
# Nya fredssamtal i Mellanöstern – Ellos på väg till börsen

**Feed**: efn-borsfrukost  
**Published**: 2026-06-22  
**Market Sentiment**: Mixed

⏱️ **Time Horizon Key**: ST = <3 months | MT = 3-12 months | LT = >12 months

---

## Episode Thesis

Monday Börsfrukost covers easing Middle East tension (Iran-US peace talks, oil down) and the upcoming Ellos IPO on Nasdaq Stockholm in Q3. Hosts dig into Synsam's subscription-revenue 'illusion' and rising churn, flag a possible H&M buyout case, and note analyst moves on Storytel and EQT. Overall mood is cautious with a softly lower open after the long weekend.

---

## Universe Stocks

### ⛔ SYNSAM — Synsam | **AVOID** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Negative | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 65%

Subscription revenue is an accounting illusion (booked upfront, factored), churn rising and understated; valuation only cheap if forecasts hold.

#### Reasoning

Host argues recurring-revenue narrative is weak: 24-month subscriptions are recognized upfront and receivables factored to a credit institution, so cash and revenue arrive at sale, leaving only renewals as truly recurring. Churn has risen ~9 quarters and is understated by ~0.7pp due to the calculation method; consumer pushback on costly subscriptions adds risk. Not expensive but too risky now.

#### Sell Triggers

- if churn keeps rising as predicted
- if new subscription sales slow
- if renewal rates fall
- if forecasts are missed

> *"Så att jag tycker det finns många orosmål och att det känns lite för riskfyllt i dagens läge."*

---

### 🟡 HM-B — H&M | **HOLD** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Mixed | **Time Horizon**: LT  
**Confidence**: 45%

Report due this week expected roughly flat with slightly better margin; contrarian buyout case as Stefan Persson keeps buying shares.

#### Reasoning

Consensus points to flat development with a modestly better margin. Sentiment is very negative ('everyone hates H&M', many selling), which a host frames as a contrarian setup: if Stefan Persson keeps buying, the company could be taken private within a few years, and that buyout optionality is the case to play.

#### Sell Triggers

- if Q report disappoints on margin
- if Persson stops buying shares
- if buyout speculation fades

> *"Fortsätter bara Stefan Persson att köpa så är de väl utköpta om några år. Det caset är väl det man kan hitta i H&M kanske."*

---

### 🟡 STORY-B — Storytel | **HOLD** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Negative | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 50%

Pareto downgraded recommendation to hold from buy; stock fell 6.5%.

#### Reasoning

Cited analyst action: Pareto cut its recommendation to behåll (hold) from köp (buy), prompting a 6.5% drop. This is a third-party analyst view rather than the hosts' own conviction.

#### Sell Triggers

- if further analyst downgrades follow
- if subscriber/revenue growth weakens

> *"Där har Pareto sänkt sin rekommendation till behåll från tidigare köp."*

---

### 🟡 EQT — EQT | **HOLD** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Neutral | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 45%

Barclays initiated coverage with an equal-weight (neutral) recommendation; stock down ~0.5%.

#### Reasoning

Cited analyst action: Barclays began coverage with an equal-weight rating, a neutral stance implying limited near-term upside or downside conviction.

#### Sell Triggers

- if Barclays shifts to underweight
- if fundraising or exit activity deteriorates

> *"Där har Barclays inlett bevakning med en jämvikt rekommendation."*

---

### 🟠 BONAV — Bonava | **WATCH** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Positive | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 45%

Up ~1% on buying land for 100 homes; hosts like its offensive stance as housing market may be thawing, with Buffett buying a homebuilder as a supportive signal.

#### Reasoning

Hosts welcome Bonava staying offensive (acquiring land) and read rising closings on Hemnet/Bolig plus Buffett buying a homebuilder as early signs the housing market is thawing. Positive but framed as an encouraging trend rather than a high-conviction call.

#### Sell Triggers

- if housing transaction volumes stall
- if rates stay restrictive
- if land purchases pressure the balance sheet

> *"Jag tycker det är kul att Bonava fortsätter vara offensiv här. Det kanske börjar tina upp äntligen på bostadsmarknaden."*

---
